name: sadr.ws
message: 📌 We, the dragons, assure our forces that we will not penetrate anything. We have important information about the Sahrawi mercenaries (Polizario) and things that have never been revealed regarding the Moroccan Sahara. We are not with this party or that, but we are with the right and the real, unfalsified history.[+] https://sadr.wsMy greetings, the dragons 🤟
